messages.title: Safety Training Reminder
messages.content: Complete your annual safety training by Friday. This includes forklift certification and emergency procedures review.

messages.title: Holiday Schedule Update
messages.content: Store hours extended to 10 PM starting December 15th through December 24th. Please check your schedules for any changes.

messages.title: Customer Service Excellence Award
messages.content: Congratulations to Team 7 for achieving 100% customer satisfaction scores this month! Your dedication to our customers is truly outstanding.

messages.title: New CBL Modules Available
messages.content: Three new CBL modules are now available: Customer Engagement, Inventory Management, and Loss Prevention Basics. Complete by end of month.

messages.title: Inventory Count Reminder
messages.content: Annual inventory count scheduled for January 15th. All departments must complete pre-count organization by January 10th.

messages.title: Fire Drill Notice
messages.content: Mandatory fire drill scheduled for December 10th at 2:00 PM. All associates must participate. Know your evacuation routes.

messages.title: Team Meeting Schedule
messages.content: Weekly team meetings will now be held every Monday at 7:00 AM in the break room. Attendance is required for all team leads.

messages.title: OBW Process Update
messages.content: Updated One Best Way procedures for checkout efficiency now available. Review the new 5-step customer greeting protocol.

messages.title: Holiday Party Announcement
messages.content: Join us for the annual holiday party on December 20th at 6:00 PM! Food, games, and prizes. RSVP by December 15th.

messages.title: GWP Recognition Program
messages.content: Great Workplace program nominations now open! Nominate a coworker who demonstrates excellent teamwork and customer service.
